title: Fantasy football sleepers + agency-attack note
html:
April 23, 2026 Yahir stacked-column note: a 10-name fantasy-football sleeper list (Brenen Thompson, Harold Fanning, Wandale Robinson, Nabers, Antonio Williams, Ted Hurst, KC Conception, Skyler Bell of the Bills, Jonah the UW RB, Navy RB) immediately followed by two startup lines: "can't finish by Monday just say fuck it and start ripping" and "coordinate an attack on agencies… have listed out all the funding options for us."

TL;DR

  • Single note carries fantasy football sleepers + a FITFO startup directive ("just say fuck it and start ripping") + an AEO agency outreach plan.
  • "Coordinate an attack on agencies" + "funding options for us" is direct AEO agency outreach + fundraising operational seed.
  • Confirms the stacked-column Yahir note pattern is still the dominant format in 2026.

yahir gonzalez · fantasy football trilogy · aeo agency · fitfo · austin tx
